title: scene.createObject response result
description: Graceful acknowledgement of a scene.createObject request. accepted reports whether the engine performed the creation. newId, when present, is the opaque id the engine assigned to the new object; it is a generic string handle, never a live-memory reference or engine pointer.

accepted.description: Whether the engine accepted and performed the object creation.

newId.description: Optional opaque id the engine assigned to the newly created object.
